## RuntimeContext.getProcedure() method

Gets a procedure by its composite ID. Used internally by RuntimeRecipe for procedure resolution.

**Signature:**

```typescript
getProcedure(id: string): Result<IProcedure>;
```

Result&lt;IProcedure&gt;
